title: Furry Stress Ball for Sensory Play Rainbow Jelly Bead Texture Squeeze Toy Relieves Stress and Anxiety Plush Calming Tactile Sensory Toy for Children and Adults Handheld Fidget Focus 4 Pack
features: SOFT SENSORY DELIGHT – Dive into a world of tactile joy with the furry stress ball, featuring a plush rainbow fur surface and jelly bead core that invites non-stop squeezing. It creates a playful, soothing sensation in your hand, bringing comfort and cheer with every touch. Perfect for sensory play, it brightens moods and builds fine motor skills in a fun, memorable way.

CALMING STRESS RELIEF – Feeling overwhelmed? This furry stress ball helps melt away tension with each gentle squeeze. Its satisfying texture provides a calming effect and can become a reliable companion for busy minds at school, home or work. Ideal for children and grown-ups seeking a simple, cheerful way to manage stress or refocus energy naturally.

BRIGHT RAINBOW COLOURS – A visual treat as well as a tactile one, the sensory toy shines with vibrant rainbow shades. From brilliant pinks to refreshing blues and vivid greens, its friendly appearance uplifts spirits and encourages positive sensory experiences. Great for bringing colour and positivity into daily routines for both young ones and adults.

VERSATILE AND PORTABLE – Just the right size to fit comfortably in little or big hands, this handheld fidget toy travels easily in a pocket or bag. Whether it’s a classroom, office or playground, the sensory ball offers quick relaxation or playful distraction just when you need it. Suitable for most ages, recommended for children aged 3 and up.

SAFE FAMILY FUN – Rest assured with a soft plush exterior and jelly beads inside, designed for repeated, gentle squishing. Comes as a handy 4 pack, ideal for sharing. Electoys brings colourful stress toys created for lasting enjoyment and sensory development for all ages.
description: Product description Experience playful relief with the Furry Stress Ball from Electoys, designed to make every squeeze a burst of sensory delight. Encased in vibrant rainbow plush, these stress balls feature a jelly bead interior that brings a uniquely soothing, tactile experience for both children and adults. A companion for daily adventures and quiet moments, this sensory toy is perfect for squeezing away worries, centring attention, and sparking joy all at once. Bright colours make it both a visual and sensory treat, whether it’s perched on a desk, slipped into a school bag, or passed around at family gatherings. The plush texture calms while the jelly beads provide fidget-friendly feedback that helps release built-up energy and encourage mindful relaxation. Sized so it sits snugly in any hand, the furry stress ball is suitable for children aged 3 years and up, as well as teens and grown-ups seeking lively stress relief. Share the cheerful vibes with the practical 4 pack, offering enough to keep a stress ball handy at home, in the classroom, or at the office. Every Electoys sensory toy is designed to add colour, comfort, and gentle support to your day – making it a thoughtful addition for anyone who benefits from fidgeting, tactile feedback, or simple sensory play. Let soft fur, rainbow shades, and that irresistible squish become a trusted part of your calm routine and brighten every squeeze. Safety Warning Keep away from fire
